productName: Super Fog - Loud - Tank - 1g (1pk) - Blueberry Muffin - IND - Sweet
description: This hybrid cartridge loads Blueberry Muffin into a sleek 510-thread pen for clean, convenient draws — premium oil, precise hits, zero hassle. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — with notes of butter, blueberry, and vanilla, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
